text:
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub notification that the Jeeves Daily Pipeline workflow run failed for jeeves-unchained repository.
- [escalation] lang.mc@gmail.com: Jeeves pipeline alert for permanent failure with 429 rate limit error in Daily pipeline.
- [escalation] Andy: Rich Lang (brother Andy) forwards a blog article about manufacturing that reminded him of Michael's views.

- [escalation] lang.mc@gmail.com: Jeeves daily correspondence report highlighting a Google security alert about an unrecoverable account.
- [escalation] Google: Google security alert that a Google Account is no longer recoverable.
